title: Japanese scripts
wikitext:
[]: Japanese scripts             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Sun Nov 21, 2010 6:46 pm Anyone know where the Japanese scripts can be found, kanji and all?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Nov 21, 2010 7:03 pm You are looking for the Evangelion Original script books. I have them, but I don't know if they are transcripts, or the original scripts. And if they are the original scripts, I don't know how much they differ from how it was presented in the show. I imagine the book has the original scripts.

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Sat Nov 27, 2010 5:22 pm I think I recall reichu mentioning they're the same except for an extra Seele convo at the end of ep. 24, or something. I'd buy that if it had furigana.. I'm sure the scripts are available for free on the Japanese web if you know how to search.

[]:             Quote Post by gwern » Thu Dec 23, 2010 7:27 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: You are looking for the Evangelion Original script books. I have them, but I don't know if they are transcripts, or the original scripts. And if they are the original scripts, I don't know how much they differ from how it was presented in the show. I imagine the book has the original scripts.
